name: Makhana
shortDescription: Premium makhana for light snacking, tea-time bowls, gifting, and modern pantry presentation.
description: Agree Superfoods Makhana is a clean, familiar snacking favourite presented with a premium everyday pantry feel.
fullDescription: Makhana brings strong cultural familiarity to the Agree Superfoods range while still feeling modern and premium. It fits naturally into tea-time snacking, gifting moments, pantry jars, and light everyday munching.

Agree Superfoods positions makhana as a snack-led essential that feels easy to understand and easy to revisit. The copy focuses on simplicity, snack appeal, and polished presentation rather than hype.
benefits: A familiar snack option with broad household appeal
Easy to enjoy as part of light snacking and gifting routines
Adds an Indian pantry favourite to a premium wellness range
usageIdeas: Enjoy as a simple tea-time or evening snack
Use in snack bowls, gifting hampers, or pantry jars
Season lightly at home for different flavour preferences
bestFor: Customers looking for a familiar, lighter snack option
Retail shelves focused on modern Indian pantry favourites

productDetails.label: Storage
productDetails.value: Keep airtight in a cool, dry place

images.alt: Photo of dried lotus seeds snack for Agree Superfoods makhana product

highlights.title: Snack appeal
highlights.description: A product that feels easy to trust and easy to serve.

highlights.title: Use
highlights.description: Fits casual snacking, gifting, and simple pantry routines.

highlights.title: Range role
highlights.description: Keeps the collection rooted in recognisable everyday habits.

faqs.question: Is makhana positioned as a snack or a pantry ingredient?
faqs.answer: It is primarily presented as a premium snack favourite, while still fitting well into gifting and pantry jars.

faqs.question: Does makhana fit the premium tone of the brand?
faqs.answer: Yes. It gives Agree Superfoods a recognisable Indian snack product with clean, modern presentation.

seo.title: Makhana
